All 4 phases present (CAPTURE, INVESTIGATE, HYPOTHESIZE, PRESCRIBE) in strict sequential order. Skill references diagnostic-analyst subagent and both reference files (investigation-patterns.md, workflow-integration.md) correctly.

diagnostic-analyst subagent at src/claude/agents/diagnostic-analyst.md correctly references root-cause-diagnosis skill. investigation-patterns.md documents all 6 failure categories (Spec Drift, Test Assertion, Import/Dependency, Coverage Gaps, Anti-Pattern Violations, DoD/Commit). workflow-integration.md contains integration pseudocode for Phase 03, Phase 05, and QA Phase 2.

diagnosis-before-fix.md rule file exists at src/claude/rules/workflow/ with HALT trigger clearly defined. Rule correctly references .claude/skills/root-cause-diagnosis/SKILL.md and documents diagnostic-analyst subagent invocation as required action when 3+ fix attempts fail.

diagnostic-analyst subagent tools array verified as exactly [Read, Grep, Glob]. No Write, Edit, or Bash tools present. Read-only enforcement by design is complete, enforcing least-privilege security model per BR-003.

NFR-001: SKILL.md = 376 lines (threshold <500). NFR-002: diagnostic-analyst.md = 297 lines (threshold <500). NFR-003: diagnosis-before-fix.md = 124 lines (threshold <200). All size constraints satisfied per Anthropic Agent Skills Specification and conditional rule budget.

YAML frontmatter verified: SKILL.md contains name: root-cause-diagnosis, description field, and allowed-tools: Read Grep Glob Task. diagnostic-analyst.md contains name: diagnostic-analyst, description field, and tools array. All metadata fields conform to Anthropic specification.

integration_test_categories.rule_integration_test: 4/4 checks passed - HALT trigger and skill path correct
integration_test_categories.size_compliance: 3/3 NFRs satisfied - All line count limits met

recommendation: STORY-491 integration tests validate all component interactions successfully. Cross-references resolve correctly between skill, subagent, and rule files. All files deployed to src/ tree following source-tree.md patterns. Ready for Phase 5 (QA Deep Analysis).
